questions.didItPass: Yes. The conveyor materialized the SEJ, SOG, schema, gate, policy, artifact manifest, and receipts.
questions.howDoIUseIt: Run story plan with a story and slice, then story implement with --target-kind cognitive-ba-lane.
questions.whatDidYouBuild: The conveyor wrote a reusable SEJ-native cognitive BA worker lane contract cluster.
questions.whatEvidenceProvesIt: The materialization receipt lists every generated contract path and hash.
questions.whatIsStillBlocked: The generated cognitive BA lane blocks until the conveyor worker runtime binds Gemini/OpenAI provider invocation.
questions.whyDidYouBuildIt: To prove SEJ can be authored by a conveyor run instead of hand-stitched by an agent.
